self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Jinni's Whisper: every 10s the wielder gains 0.036/0.045/0.054/0.063/0.072% (R1/R3/R5) Energy Recharge per point of Elemental Mastery they have for 12s. Auto-applied from the wielder's own live EM, selected by the leaderboard's chosen refinement for this weapon (main-weapon-pool selection).

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Jinni's Whisper (support use, assumes R5): nearby party members gain 30% of the wielder's Jinni's Whisper buff (=0.0216% ER per point of the wielder's EM) as flat Energy Recharge. Type the support wielder's actual EM into this condition's input for an exact value; the checkbox-only fallback assumes 800 EM.
